fileValidation.tooLarge: File is too large. Max size is {{maxMb}} MB.

mapping.resolveRequired: Please finish the missing required fields and confirm every column that needs review.
mapping.lockedBatch: Mappings are locked for this upload.
mapping.confirmRoleChangeFirst: Confirm or cancel the role change first.
mapping.roleChangePrompt: You selected {{selected}}, which is not the suggested role ({{suggested}}). Confirm this change?

highConfidence.title: Ready to use
highConfidence.sub: AIMOPS matched these columns with high confidence. You can still review them if needed.

requiredMissing.title: Required fields missing
requiredMissing.sub: Choose the correct column for each required field before continuing.

needsMapping.title: Needs mapping
needsMapping.sub: Choose what each column means so AIMOPS can use it correctly.

needsVerification.title: Needs review ({{confirmed}}/{{total}} confirmed)
needsVerification.sub: Confirm the suggestion or choose a different role.

suggestedSkip.title: Suggested to skip
suggestedSkip.sub: These columns probably are not needed for reports, forecasts, or product analysis.

review.title: Merge duplicates, then confirm products
review.subNotExtracted: Extract products from this upload first
review.productsConfirmedSuccess: Products confirmed successfully. You can finish now.
review.noProductsExtracted: No products were extracted from this upload.

modal.title: Manage merges
modal.noCandidates: No other product names found in this upload.

uploadCard.deleteTitle: Deletes this upload and its sales records

analyzeProgress.hint: This may take a few seconds depending on the file size.

uploadsList.emptyFiltered: No uploads match the current filters.
uploadsList.completedOpenProducts: This upload is completed. Open the Products page to view imported products.

mappingPage.title: Map Columns
mappingPage.alreadyConfirmedInfo: Mappings are already confirmed for this upload. Editing is locked to avoid processing it again.
mappingPage.completedNoticeMessage: The products from this file were already added to AIMOPS. There is nothing else to map here, so you can go back to uploads or open the Products page.
mappingPage.friendlyFileTypeError: We could not finish preparing this upload right now. Your file was uploaded, but AIMOPS could not continue the product extraction step. Please try again after the backend fix, or ask the backend team to check this upload.
mappingPage.friendlyCompletedError: This upload is already finished. The products from this file were already added to AIMOPS, so there is nothing else to map here.

help.title: How to use Column Mapping

reviewRoles.title: 1. Review suggested roles
reviewRoles.description: AIMOPS suggests what each column means, like Date, Product name, Quantity, Unit price, or Total amount.

confirmUncertain.title: 2. Confirm uncertain columns
confirmUncertain.description: Columns that need review must be confirmed before you continue. Use the sample values to check if the suggestion is correct.

fixRequired.title: 3. Fix missing required fields
fixRequired.description: If a required field is missing, choose the correct column manually from the dropdown.

skipIrrelevant.title: 4. Skip irrelevant columns
skipIrrelevant.description: Columns that are not useful for sales analysis can stay skipped. Only include columns that help reports, forecasts, and product analysis.

help.note: You can continue only when all required mappings and review items are resolved.

reviewPage.title: Extract & Confirm Products
reviewPage.noMappingsWarn: No confirmed mappings were found for this upload. Go back and confirm the column mappings again.
reviewPage.noProductNameInfo: Product extraction needs at least product_name, and usually date, quantity, unit_price, and total_amount. Go back and fix the column mappings if needed.
reviewPage.alreadyProcessedInfo: This upload has already been processed. You can finish and return to uploads.
reviewPage.notifMessage: {{count}} new product(s) from batch #{{batchId}} have been confirmed and are now available.
reviewPage.errorExtractNeedsProductName: Extract products needs at least product_name, and usually date, quantity, unit_price, and total_amount.
reviewPage.errorCannotConfirmYet: Cannot confirm products yet. Make sure extraction succeeded.

help.title: How to use Product Review

checkProducts.title: 1. Check extracted products
checkProducts.description: Review the products AIMOPS found from the uploaded sales file. Make sure the names and categories look correct.

mergeDuplicates.title: 2. Merge duplicates
mergeDuplicates.description: Use Manage merges when the same product appears with different spellings or names. This keeps reports and forecasts cleaner.

watchWarnings.title: 3. Watch typo warnings
watchWarnings.description: Warning chips show possible spelling issues or product names that may need merging.

confirmProducts.title: 4. Confirm products
confirmProducts.description: After confirming, the products become available for the rest of the system, including reports and forecasting.

help.note: Once products are confirmed or the upload is already processed, editing is locked.

uploadsPage.title: Upload Sales Data
uploadsPage.deleteDialogMessage:
Are you sure you want to delete "{{fileName}}"?

The uploaded file and its sales records will be removed.
Your products will not be deleted.
uploadsPage.deleteUploadHumanMessage:
Are you sure you want to delete "{{fileName}}"?

The uploaded file and its sales records will be removed.
Your products will not be deleted.
uploadsPage.bulkDeleteDialogMessage:
Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} selected upload(s)?

The uploaded files and their sales records will be removed.
Your products will not be deleted.
uploadsPage.bulkDeletePartialFailed: {{failed}} of {{total}} selected upload(s) could not be deleted.
uploadsPage.errorDuplicateFile: This file was already uploaded before. Please choose a different file.
uploadsPage.overlapWarning: Overlapping date range detected ({{from}} → {{to}}). Existing records in that range were replaced to avoid duplicates.
uploadsPage.overlapWarningWithRows: Overlapping date range detected ({{from}} → {{to}}). Existing records in that range were replaced to avoid duplicates. ({{deleted}} row(s) replaced)

help.title: How to use Data Upload

uploadFile.title: 1. Upload a sales file
uploadFile.description: Choose a CSV or Excel file that contains sales data such as date, product name, quantity, price, and total amount.

checkUploads.title: 2. Check previous uploads
checkUploads.description: Use the uploads table to find older files, filter by date, search by file name, or sort by status.

continueWorkflow.title: 3. Continue the workflow
continueWorkflow.description: Click an uploaded file to continue mapping columns or reviewing extracted products depending on its progress.

completedUploads.title: 4. Completed uploads
completedUploads.description: When an upload is completed, products are available from the Products page instead of reopening the upload review.

deleteCarefully.title: 5. Delete carefully
deleteCarefully.description: Deleting an upload removes that upload batch from AIMOPS.

help.note: Tip: If a report or forecast is empty, make sure your sales data was uploaded and fully processed first.
